name: kbd
description: A keyboard-key badge (v-next): the small recessed pill that shows a shortcut key (Ctrl, Cmd, Esc) or a chord (Ctrl+K). Takes a List<String> of key names; a single-entry list renders one <kbd>; a multi-entry list renders an outer <kbd> wrapping inner <kbd> elements with a separator. Size scale (sm|md|lg); ariaLabel smart attr; monospace font via --lv-font-mono. Renders the semantic <kbd> element (screen-reader-correct), token-styled with muted fill + 1px border. Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the kbd partial (+ its kbd/group child) to your JTE root at lievit/kbd.jte, reached as @template.lievit.kbd(keys=java.util.List.of("Esc")). v-next: pass a single-element list for one key, a multi-element list for a chord (Ctrl+K). Size: sm|md|lg. ariaLabel overrides the AT announcement when needed. The source is yours: edit freely.
